package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for dynamodb_scan_in_handler: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `dynamodb.Scan` in request handler functions
type CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerModel
}

type CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveDynamodbScanInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDynamodbScanInHandlerDTO) error {
    svc := dynamodb.New(session.Must(session.NewSession()))
    _, _ = svc.ScanWithContext(ctx, &dynamodb.ScanInput{
        TableName: aws.String(input),
    })
    return nil
}
